reasoning: Strong risk-on rotation with broad sector confirmation. XLK +0.71% and XLF +0.52% both outpace the 0.5% threshold while moving in the same direction, signaling tech and financial leadership. XLE down -0.97% while growth sectors rise is the classic defensive rotation out of energy. SPY advancing +0.98% above the individual sector moves indicates broad-based participation, not narrow tech-only movement. Two major sectors aligned (XLK + XLF), energy confirming rotation direction, and SPY breadth all support bullish bias.
key_observations: XLK +0.71%: Tech leadership confirmed, growth rotation in play
XLF +0.52%: Financial strength supporting broad SPY advance, yield environment favorable
XLE -0.97%: Energy weakness typical of risk-on days, confirms rotation away from defensive
SPY +0.98% outpace sector leaders: Broad-based move beyond just tech, indicating sustained upside potential
